channel.title: Pages on J. Marcus Hughes
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on J. Marcus Hughes

item.title: About
item.description: I am a computer scientist with 5+ years of experience. I have a bachelors in computer science and astronomy from Williams College. I’m interested in software applications in solar physics, including machine learning. Currently, I’m working on building the data reduction pipelines for PUNCH and for CubIXSS. I am certified in: Prefect NASA Open Science DeepLearning.AI TensorFlow In my spare time, I like reading, sculpting with polymer clay, journaling, and many more things.
